---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5}

**Hunter Martaindale**\
ALERRT Center\
Texas State University\
San Marcos, TX

**Email:** [MartaindaleLLC\@gmail.com](mailto:MartaindaleLLC@gmail.com)

**Links**

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_7PlqKYAAAAJ)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/huntermartaindale)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hmartaindale/)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8100-7698)
- [ALERRT Center](https://alerrt.org)

**Areas of Expertise**

- Active shooter incident analysis, response protocols, and training program evaluation
- Officer decision making
- Public opinion of police and community-police relations
- Expert witness services in use of force and police practices litigation

I am available for research consulting, expert witness testimony, training consultation, speaking engagements, and media commentary. Use the form to introduce your inquiry, or email directly.

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7}

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/mykbwyyn" method="POST">
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-name" class="form-label">Name</label>
    <input type="text" class="form-control" id="c-name" name="name" required>
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-email" class="form-label">Email</label>
    <input type="email" class="form-control" id="c-email" name="email" required>
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-org" class="form-label">Organization</label>
    <input type="text" class="form-control" id="c-org" name="organization">
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-type" class="form-label">Type of Inquiry</label>
    <select class="form-select" id="c-type" name="inquiry_type">
      <option value="">Select...</option>
      <option value="consulting">Research Consulting</option>
      <option value="expert-witness">Expert Witness</option>
      <option value="speaking">Speaking Engagement</option>
      <option value="training">Training Consultation</option>
      <option value="media">Media Request</option>
      <option value="other">Other</option>
    </select>
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="c-message" class="form-label">Message</label>
    <textarea class="form-control" id="c-message" name="message" rows="5" required></textarea>
  </div>
  <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Send</button>
</form>

:::

:::
